• HTML5 game with canvas rendering and responsive UI
  • Multiplayer support via MQTT/WebSocket for real-time synchronization
  • Procedurally generated infinite 2D mining world with various ores and materials
  • Resource management system with fuel, hull integrity, and cargo capacity
  • Upgrade shop system for drill tiers, hull, fuel capacity, and special items
  • Mobile-optimized touch controls with D-pad and action buttons
  • Inventory system with building blocks and consumable items
  • Local and cloud save system with IndexedDB and Puter integration
  • Admin/host system for server management and world control
  • Dynamic lighting and day/night cycle effects
  • Custom modal system for prompts and confirmations
  • Real-time minimap and coordinate display
    const GameEngine = new GameEngine();
    const Network = new NetworkManager();
    const Sound = new SoundManager();

Mega Miner NG is a comprehensive HTML5 mining game featuring multiplayer capabilities, procedural world generation, and extensive upgrade systems. The game includes canvas-based rendering, touch-optimized mobile controls, real-time synchronization through MQTT, and persistent storage using IndexedDB with optional cloud backup. Players mine resources, upgrade their equipment, manage fuel and cargo, and can interact with other players in shared worlds while maintaining local progress through robust save systems.
